title: oreodaphne cupularis
intro: Oreodaphne cupularis, also known as Himalayan Oreodaphne, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lauraceae, native to the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Oreodaphne cupularis include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its traditional use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Oreodaphne cupularis can be prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make herbal preparations like infusions and poultices.
